title: Baked Fish with Portuguese Crust
description: A simple and flavorful dish featuring a crispy Portuguese crust on a delicate fish fillet. This recipe is perfect for a quick dinner or lunch.

ingredients.name: Portuguese bread crust mix
ingredients.notes: Available at most grocery stores or online

ingredients.name: Gratin cheese (such as Edam or Gouda)

instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Season the fish fillets with salt and black pepper.
Mix the Portuguese bread crust mix with xtra-virgin olive oil to create a paste.
Coat each fish fillet with the bread crust mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
Place the coated fish fillets on the prepared baking sheet.
Top each fish fillet with a sprinkle of crisp onion and a sprinkle of gratin cheese.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through and the crust is golden brown.
